final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing UI design system in a classic minimalist tech style, covering web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: clean flat UI design system, classic minimalist tech aesthetic, crisp vector graphics with subtle depth
Subject: comprehensive UI component library including dashboard layout, mobile screens, data cards, primary/secondary buttons, form controls, navigation elements
Composition: organized component grid layout, multiple viewport mockups side by side, generous white space, consistent 8px grid system
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as primary, electric blue or cyan as accent, clean white backgrounds, subtle gray hierarchy
Materials/textures: smooth matte surfaces, subtle drop shadows for elevation, glass-morphism accents on key elements
Constraints: must maintain visual consistency across all components; scalable for both desktop and mobile; accessible contrast ratios
Avoid: skeuomorphic textures; excessive gradients; decorative noise; cluttered layouts; generic corporate blue; drop shadows that imply depth where none exists
